programme.desc: El administrador del sanatorio descubre quién es Martín y lo manipula para que no diga nada, Hortencia se interesa en él. Sarita, Ruth y Antonio vigilan el rancho Elizondo por las noches.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta sorprende a Juan hablando con Paula sobre el momento de pasión que compartieron en la despedida de soltero, los celos que siente son tan fuertes que sale a toda prisa y cae por las escaleras. El incidente acarrea la terrible pérdida del bebé.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta sentencia a Juan al olvido y decide seguir adelante lejos de él. La ambición de Rosa no le permite apoyar a su hija, mientras Miguel le ofrece su completo respaldo. Paula sufre el rechazo por el resultado de sus juegos sensuales.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta amenaza a Paula y le declara una guerra frontal. Ella hace hasta lo imposible para vengar el dolor de un hijo perdido. Gustavo llega a la hacienda para iniciar el trámite de divorcio, pero José le insiste que debe reconciliar a la pareja.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta no quiere ceder ante las peticiones de volver con su esposo y pide el divorcio con el cincuenta por ciento de los bienes correspondientes a su contrato matrimonial. Juan no se da por vencido e insiste en reconquistarla, pero tiene un rival.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Aníbal delata a Antonia, conmovido por la grabación que le mostró Verónica. Antonia le ofrece una gran suma a Macario para que asesine a Verónica. Alejandro le recuerda a Verónica que todavía la ama. Guerra intenta seducir a Rodrigo para salvarse.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Llueven las denuncias contra Antonia. Ella intenta escapar del pueblo pero una jueza lo evita. Aníbal recibe la pena máxima y, en su celda, Verónica le revela su identidad. El embarazo de Gabriela es una esperanza para Lucía. Secuestran a Alejandro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela golpea a Macario y le confiesa quién es. Su torturador le echa la culpa a Antonia. La vida en prisión se le hace un infierno a Aníbal. Patricia y Ricardo hacen el amor por primera vez. Alejandro se escapa de la caballeriza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Macario intenta escapar de la Fortaleza, pero Chacón llega y lo apuñala. Moribundo, el sicario de Antonia pide perdón y delata a su jefa ante Rodrigo; Antonia va presa. Verónica va al hospital y Alejandro se entera que ella carga la cura para Lucía.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario visita el rancho Elizondo con el pretexto de saludar a Gabriela y a Martín, pero Armando le prohíbe que regrese allí. Fernando siente que la situación se le va de las manos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: El doctor Bustillo visita a su primo, le confiesa que descubrió que el paciente es su suegro y le pide el doble de dinero, pero lo que gana es una golpiza por parte de los hombres de Fernando.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the one million dollar prize on the line, the final three teams race to Chicago where they must complete their final challenges within the city's most iconic landmarks, including a trip to Wrigley Field, the home of the World Champion Chicago Cubs.

programme.desc: 11 of the most competitive teams in Amazing Race history take on the ultimate challenge for a shot at a Million Dollars.

programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and her colleagues face a moral dilemma when they must try to turn a client's son against his girlfriend, after both are accused of murder. Meanwhile, Diane asks Alicia to make a tough decision regarding the company's split.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Will fears his client is not getting a fair trial because the judge is biased toward him, the law firm hires a jury consultant, who claims to predict a case's outcome by reading people's expressions. Meanwhile, Will uncovers information about Bond.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Alicia's client confesses under duress to murdering a fellow prison inmate, Cary's team seeks to challenge by uncovering an unlikely connection between the two inmates. Meanwhile, Wendy Scott-Carr threatens to expose a Florrick family issue.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia races against Louis Canning to round up the most clients for an Erin Brockovich-style class action lawsuit, a mole is detected in the law firm that seems to be working for Canning. Meanwhile, Diane and Will must put their coup on hold.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Will and Diane take on a defamation case from a young Internet billionaire, who is suing the film studio for depicting him in a negative light. Meanwhile, Alicia confronts Will about the message he left on her voice mail.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Diane represents her on-again, off-again love interest, ballistics expert Kurt McVeigh, when he is sued for testimony he gave in the murder trial of an accused cop killer who was recently exonerated. Meanwhile, Eli has a personal interest in Natalie Flore

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: The law firm of Lockhart, Gardner, and Bond sues a social networking site on behalf of a Chinese dissident, who posted an anonymous blog about democracy in China and was jailed and tortured by the Chinese government when the site failed to protect him.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart Gardner law firm represents client and drug kingpin Lemond Bishop in divorce proceedings, even though Bishop wants reconciliation. Meanwhile, Kalinda is subpoenaed for a grand jury investigation.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: When a comedy streaming network executive, Del Cooper, asks Liz to conduct a sensitivity read on one of his comedians, the entire firm ends up fighting over how comedy and 'cancel culture' collide. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi trek into Rwanda's forest to see Colobus monkeys with their famous black-and-white markings, and hike a volcanic island filled with fruit bats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Monkey Business
programme.desc: Get ready for some monkey business! From proboscis monkeys, to howlers, baboons and macaques, Jack is counting down some of his favorite primates all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: What does it take to rescue some of the world’s biggest, fastest and strongest animals? Find out as Jack counts down the amazing rescue stories of six special creatures. Chimps, dolphins, cheetahs, Asian elephants, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack Hanna as he counts down the species that live their lives where other creatures fear to tread – right on the edge!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Olympians
programme.desc: Jungle Jack has recruited seven incredible athletes that you'll never see at the Olympics, like flight-footed felines, boxing kangaroos and powerful primates. See who gets the gold as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Rwanda for an incredible encounter with Golden Monkeys before getting a taste of the local fishing traditions, and they visit a primary school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack leaves his safari truck behind and treks into the wild, on foot, to meet animals face-to-face. Come along as he encounters, Lions, Bats, Cheetahs, Hippos, Sea Turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack's daughter travels to British Columbia to catch sight of the Vancouver Island Marmot, one of the rarest mammals on earth. Meanwhile on Salt Spring Island, Jungle Jack visits a rehab center specializing in the holistic care of native animals.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six of his all-time scariest safaris. Come along as he comes face-to-face with Alligators, Lions, Elephants, Cheetah, Tigers and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out why all of the animals on today’s countdown are showing off their pearly whites. From the hippos' mega-chompers to snakes with fangs that inject toxic venom, and piranhas, crocs, African elephants and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an epic adventure into South Africa's Zululand. All that before meeting the notorious Zulu warriors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue pack their bags and head to Alberta, Canada! Come along as they encounter wild moose in the Canadian Rockies, cross paths with bighorn sheep and spot a gang of travelling elk.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet the loveable loners of the animal kingdom. Moose, Black Rhinos, Leatherback Sea Turtles, Platypus, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle as he saddles up for six amazing ranching adventures! From working a dude ranch in Canada to herding sheep with Patagonian gauchos, and cattle ranching in Montana, Jack is living the ultimate cowboy life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack brings us bouncing baby animals from around the world. Some are cute, some are cuddly, and some bring us hope for the next generation of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family brave the unpredictable weather and visit the beautiful islands of Fiji. A trip to see red-footed boobies quickly turns into a sea snake-infested island expedition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a rainforest outside Rio de Janeiro, Jack visits a breeding program that's slowly restoring the wild population of endangered Golden Lion Tamarins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of Jack in his own backyard on this trip to Bigfork, Montana. And, Jack and Sue visit Triple D Game Ranch to get an up-close look at bears, wolves, and even an elusive cougar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Everybody loves baby animals – especially Jack and Sue! Check out some unpredictable moments from undeniably cute babies like wombats, koalas, elephants -- and even a black rhino named after you know who.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Armed with Armor
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down wild creatures that come equipped with their very own body armor!

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows how to cook oozy mushroom risotto, with spinach salad and quick lemon and raspberry cheesecake, all in just 30 minutes.

programme.desc: Jamie shows pushbike couriers how to make great lunches; squashed cherry tomato salad; meatballs; calzones.

programme.desc: Jamie prepares chick pea and leek soup, braised lamb shanks and English trifle for the men renovating his flat.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Vegetarian meal; mushroom sarnie; tagliatelle; pecan and vanilla ice cream.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie coaches stand-up comedians to adopt a healthier diet.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: A post-match meal for rugby players; chicken in milk; proper polenta; panettone bread-and-butter pudding.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie cooks marinated squid salad, pot roasted pork and a fruit cobbler for fans of the music group ABBA.

programme.title: Save With Jamie
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes fish tikka curry, spicy cheese and beans and many more delicious dishes.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks his incredible avocado pastry quiche with a delicious cheesy and basil filling, and takes a classic steak to the next level.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a super-fast, extra delicious crispy breaded chicken for the family; he and Buddy share their secrets to a cheat's dessert; then Jamie shows us how to transform a burger by using sweet potato in two new ways.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a big, bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavor -it's a new family favorite in the Oliver house, then he shows us the most beautifully brilliant way to dress an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flat breads.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: Oliver visits Britain's largest school catering company to try to ban junk food from their menu.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie demonstrates more recipes tailored for these unique times, including a puff pizza with ratatouille-style topping, easy lamb kofta flatbreads, and tomato risotto.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret is elated when he wins an "Arabian mount" in a card game until he sees that it's not a horse, but a very friendly camel. This trusty steed soon proves its worth.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Bret and Bart Maverick see a way to win some money aboard the River Princess. However, they soon find themselves in the middle of a kidnapping.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister rides to collect a prisoner, but the prisoner breaks jail before he arrives. The prisoner saves Hollister from an Apache ambush. But soon Hollister must pit his courage and fast gun against two desperate men.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) decides to go undercover to prevent editor Claibourne (Richard Eastham) from being murdered by a hitman who has been hired by a vengeful, local rancher whom the editor once helped to send to prison.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: As Clay watches the arrival of the stage from Tucson, a shooting down the street diverts his attention, and a $30,000 army payroll is stolen from a cavalry captain on the stage. Wounded and disarmed, he's forced into a battle to solve the crime.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Writer Jay Pell sets out to create a new legendary bad man for his readers. He persuades an outlaw to hold up a stagecoach so that he can write an 'eyewitness' account. When things go wrong, Sheriff Clay Hollister is tricked into another scheme.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: With his fiancée arriving from London, Ron Browning will do anything to keep her from finding out what a failure he is…even die…at least on paper. But his courage in a later crisis may restore his self-respect and save the Sheriff at the same time.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Paul Hayden is baited into a fight with three wild brothers, wounding one. When he later meets and falls in love with Karen Thomas, the sister of his three assailants, Hollister attempts to untangle the snarled affairs and prevent murder.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gallant Bat Masterson turns Cupid's little mailman. When the man escorting three mail-order brides to Noble Creek, is shot, Bat becomes his replacement. For some unknown reason, a certain 'hot gun' doesn't want the gals to arrive.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Sheriff-maker Bat Masterson has his work cut out for him after brothers Jeb, Gus and Jocko Dakota gun down the lawman in their town. Their purpose: they want a free hand in operating their rackets.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The Dooling boys - one of the roughest crowds on the Frontier - terrorize Angie Pierce and her son. Having escaped the hooligans, Angie seeks Bat Masterson's protection against them.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Loyal friend Bat Masterson sees in a youthful gunslinger the image of an old friend who had died in an Indian battle years ago. He sets out to discover if the trigger-happy boy is the orphaned son of his friend.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Poker champ Bat Masterson has important testimony to offer at the trial of H.C. Smith, charged with murdering Bat's friend during a card game.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
